name: ai-rules-manager
description: Point-and-click VS Code manager for AI_Rules source updates, rule sync, and orphan cleanup.

aiRules.repoRoot.description: User setting only. Optional local AI_Rules repository root. When set, this path must contain Scripts/AI-RulesManager.ps1.

aiRules.repoUrl.description: User setting only. Git URL used to create the managed AI_Rules cache when the current workspace is not the AI_Rules repository.

aiRules.powerShellPath.description: User setting only. PowerShell executable used to run AI_Rules scripts.

commands.title: AI Rules: 檢查來源狀態
AI Rules: 檢查 VSIX 安裝包新版
AI Rules: 查看來源更新影響

AI Rules: 同步使用者層規則
AI Rules: 同步已安裝平台規則
AI Rules: 同步 Codex 專案規則
AI Rules: 同步 Claude 專案規則
AI Rules: 同步 Antigravity 專案規則
AI Rules: 清理孤兒檔案
AI Rules: 記憶主檔遷移
AI Rules: 版控排除規則健檢

scripts.verify:runtime: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const pkg=require('./package.json');const fail=(message)=>{console.error(message);process.exit(1);};const main=String(pkg.main||'');if(main!=='./out/extension.js'&&main!=='out/extension.js')fail('package.json main must point to out/extension.js');for(const file of [main,'out/scriptRunner.js']){if(!fs.existsSync(path.resolve(file)))fail('Missing runtime file: '+file);}const runtime=fs.readFileSync(path.resolve('out/scriptRunner.js'),'utf8');const need=(needle,label)=>{if(!runtime.includes(needle))fail('Missing runtime sentinel: '+label);};const order=(first,second,label)=>{const a=runtime.indexOf(first);const b=runtime.indexOf(second);if(a<0||b<0||a>=b)fail('Runtime sentinel order failed: '+label);};[['vscode.workspace.isTrusted','workspace trust'],['assertGitRepoIdentity','repo identity guard'],['assertManagedPath','managed path guard'],['assertTrackedCleanManagerScript','tracked clean manager script'],['ls-files','tracked manager script check'],['status','clean manager script check'],['+refs/heads/','explicit fetch refspec source'],[':refs/remotes/origin/','explicit fetch refspec destination'],['assertReadyToRun(source, script, target)','readiness gate'],['cp.spawn(ps, args','manager spawn']].forEach(([needle,label])=>need(needle,label));order('assertReadyToRun(source, script, target)','cp.spawn(ps, args','readiness before spawn');order('assertGitRepoIdentity(managedRoot, repoUrl)','--hard','identity before destructive reset');order('assertManagedPath(storageRoot, managedRoot);','--hard','managed path before destructive reset');console.log('Runtime verification passed.');"
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run verify:runtime
